name: Zhen Ding Technology Holding Limited
summary: Zhen Ding Technology Holding Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacturing and sale of various printed circuit board (PCB) products in the United States, Mainland China, Taiwan, Singapore, and internationally. The company offers high density interconnection products for use in various electrical products, such as mobile devices, PCs, digital cameras, E-books, and others; and flexible printed circuits for use in telecom, computer, and consumer electronic applications. It also provides rigid PCBs for use in networking, big data computing, cloud storage, and automotive and consumer electronic applications; and integrated circuit substrates for use in communication, computer, consumer, and other products. The company was formerly known as Foxconn Advanced Technology Limited and changed its name to Zhen Ding Technology Holding Limited in June 2011. Zhen Ding Technology Holding Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
